news.title: Pokémon TCG Pocket developer DeNA has received 1.5 billion yen in subsidies, sparking debate about whether the studio actually needs the investment
news.titleEN: Pokémon TCG Pocket developer DeNA has received 1.5 billion yen in subsidies, sparking debate about whether the studio actually needs the investment
news.desc: Pokémon TCG Pocket isn't what you'd call a 'small game', yet the Japanese government has given developer DeNA a 1.5 billion Yen (or an eye-watering £6,997,500) subsidy to help its mobile game development efforts. Read more
news.descEN: Pokémon TCG Pocket isn't what you'd call a 'small game', yet the Japanese government has given developer DeNA a 1.5 billion Yen (or an eye-watering £6,997,500) subsidy to help its mobile game development efforts. Read more

news.title: People are putting their Steam Machine reservations on eBay, and one has already been sold with a $235 markup
news.titleEN: People are putting their Steam Machine reservations on eBay, and one has already been sold with a $235 markup
news.desc: Valve may have succeeded in preventing scalpers from ruining the launch of the Steam Machine, but the company can't stop people from selling their devices. Or, in this case, their future devices. Read more

news.title: Xbox reportedly stops signing third-party Game Pass deals
news.titleEN: Xbox reportedly stops signing third-party Game Pass deals
news.desc: Microsoft might have hit pause on signing any more third-party Game Pass deals. Presumably it's doing this while restructuring Xbox, as it's reported to be doing, but will it open the cheque book again after? Read more

news.title: A long-buried secret hidden in a cosy game about books made me realise something essential
news.titleEN: A long-buried secret hidden in a cosy game about books made me realise something essential
news.desc: Hello! Eurogamer is once again marking Pride with a week of features celebrating the intersection of queer culture and gaming in all its guises. Things get underway today as Lottie plays historian in Tiny Bookshop and is moved by what she finds. And
